dateline: Johnson Space Center, Houston / Kennedy Space Center — 2017–Present
heroHeadline: Artemis II Crew Home — Post-Mission Analysis Underway, Orion Heat Shield Under 30-Day Inspection
heroSubtitle: Apr 11–12: The Artemis II crew received an emotional homecoming at JSC Houston after their historic 10-day lunar flyby. Commander Wiseman: 'We are bonded forever.' Orion is en route to KSC for a 30-day heat shield inspection — results will determine if the Artemis IV crewed lunar landing timeline (2028) is confirmed. Congress hailed the mission as America's return to deep space leadership.
footerNote: Data sourced from NASA.gov, OIG Reports, SpaceNews, Ars Technica, Congressional appropriations. Tier 1: NASA/ESA/Official. Tier 2: SpaceNews/Ars Technica/Reuters. Tier 3: Planetary Society/AIAA.
